title: Drug Establishment Licence - Calculation Chart - Canada.ca
content:
## Drug Establishment Licence - Calculation Chart
The Calculation Chart is used to estimate the total fees for a Drug Establishment licence.
In order to obtain a copy of the Drug Establishment Licence Fee Calculation Chart or for any additional information, please contact the Cost Recovery Invoicing Unit at hc.criu-ufrc.sc@canada.ca .
For instructions on how to use the Calculation Chart, please consult the “Welcome and Guidance” tab.
